name: proctor-passbook-app
description: Proctor Passbook — web vault (Vue 3 + Vite), backed by the passbook-wasm crypto core.

scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build --release --target web --out-dir app/src/wasm/pkg ../crates/passbook-wasm || wasm-pack build --release --target web --out-dir src/wasm/pkg ../crates/passbook-wasm
